name: Millhaven
description: A prosperous market town at the crossroads of two regional trade routes. Millhaven smells of bread, horse, and river mud. It is not remarkable — and that is exactly why people stay. The cobblestones are uneven, the inn is loud on weekends, the guards are underpaid but loyal, and everyone knows everyone. Strangers are noticed within an hour.

notableLocations.name: The Tipsy Gnome
notableLocations.description: The social heart of Millhaven. Half the town's business gets done over ale here.

notableLocations.name: Millhaven Market Square
notableLocations.description: Open-air market every Tenthday. Farmers, traveling merchants, and local craftspeople.

notableLocations.name: The Millhaven Forge
notableLocations.description: Best ironwork in three towns. Weapons, tools, horseshoes. Never closes before dark.

notableLocations.name: Green Gate Bakery
notableLocations.description: Opens before dawn. The smell reaches the inn district before sunrise.

notableLocations.name: The Apothecary & Herbary
notableLocations.description: Dried herbs, poultices, basic healing supplies. The herbalist lives above the shop.

notableLocations.name: The Guard Post
notableLocations.description: A modest two-story stone structure next to the town gate. Usually two guards on duty.

notableLocations.name: Temple of the Allmother
notableLocations.description: A modest temple to the goddess of hearth and harvest. Open to all faiths.

notableLocations.name: Millhaven Docks
notableLocations.description: Small river docks for barges and fishing vessels on the Stoneback River.

notableLocations.name: Blue Lantern Alley
notableLocations.description: The fence operates from a junk shop that smells of old leather and regret.

notableLocations.name: Mill Road (residential)
notableLocations.description: Where the working families live. Children play in the street. Laundry hangs between buildings.

notableLocations.name: Stoneback Stables
notableLocations.description: On the east road. Horses, mules, hay, and the best-kept secret gossip exchange in Millhaven.

factions.name: The Guard
factions.description: Twelve guards total, led by the captain. Paid by the town council. Variable quality.

factions.name: The Merchant Guild
factions.description: Loose association of local shopkeepers and vendors. Mostly argue about market days.

factions.name: The Temple Congregation
factions.description: The temple congregation and its informal social network.

npcRoster.name: Hodge
npcRoster.role: Fence, Blue Lantern Alley junk shop
